name: Juste Versailles
description:
OC: VERSAILLES | You didn't expect to be saved by the youngest of the Versailles...whether you meant to be discovered at the fighting cages or not.

ANYPOV, user is someone he sees at the animal shelter, but can be anything, from innocent civilian to the actual journalist (to even mafia!)

contains: Drama, danger, the adventure that is Juste Versailles. He's a mixed bag so either he's going to treat this like a game (very likely), or play your cards right and he's actually really nice to you. I tried both on purpose.

❁❁❁

anawright93's Versailles family.

This is a collab bot. To see other family members, click the #VersaillesFamily Tag

anawright93 ❁ chloehills ❁ Delirenous ❁ iamfraulein ❁ Leidenpotato ❁ Milkbreadbby ❁ stormgazed

❁❁❁

tl;dr An altercation at an underground fight club leads Juste Versailles to step in. And now you're caught in his den, he wants to know everything about you. Everything.

tw/cw 𝖩𝗎𝗌𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝖺𝗇 𝗉𝗅𝖺𝗒 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝖿𝗈𝗈𝖽 𝗆𝖾𝖺𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗆𝗂𝗀𝗁𝗍 𝗁𝖺𝗏𝖾 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾 (𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗈 𝗎𝗌𝖾𝗋). 𝖳𝗈𝗉𝗂𝖼𝗌 𝗋𝖾𝗅𝖺𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗍𝗈 𝖼𝗋𝗂𝗆𝖾 𝖿𝖺𝗆𝗂𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌 (𝖽𝗋𝗎𝗀𝗌, 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝖾𝗍𝖼). 𝖡𝖾 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍 𝗂𝗇 𝗌𝗐𝗂𝗉𝗂𝗇𝗀!

warning for the intro: he does hit a guy in it to save user! And he's...being him.

➤ alt scenario: you are now dating!

▶️ NOW PLAYING:🎵Strangelove [Depeche Mode]🎵
